title: Dyson’s super-slim PencilWash just hit its best price to date for Memorial Day
summary: The Dyson PencilWash cordless floor cleaner has hit a new low price of $249.99 (a $100 discount) for Memorial Day across multiple retailers. The slim device features a compact 1.5-inch handle designed to fit under furniture, uses a pressurized hydration system with microfiber roller to clean hard surfaces, and provides 30 minutes of battery life per charge. Its low-maintenance design keeps debris and wastewater from traveling through the machine, ensuring floors stay relatively dry after cleaning.
content:
If Dyson’s PencilVac Fluffycones made you wish the company had built something similarly slim for scrubbing the hard floors in your home, enter the recently released Dyson PencilWash. The cordless cleaner is designed to tackle spills and stains on tile and other surfaces, and right now, it’s available for a new low price of $249.99 ($100 off) from Amazon, Target, and Dyson in the run-up to Memorial Day.
Dyson PencilWash

Where to Buy:

 $349.99 $249.99 at Amazon
 $349.99 $249.99 at Target
 $349.99 $249.99 at Dyson

With its 1.5-inch-diameter handle and a design that lets it lie nearly flat, the PencilWash can easily slide under furniture and other tricky areas that bigger floor cleaners can’t reach. Built for hard surfaces like tile, laminate, and sealed wood, it uses a pressurized hydration system and a microfiber wet roller to scrub away spills while extracting dirty water with each pass, so you’re always cleaning with fresh water. There’s also a Max mode for addressing dried-on messes that are particularly tough to clean, along with a flexible neck that makes it easier to steer around obstacles.
The PencilWash is designed to be low-maintenance, too. Debris and wastewater are collected directly in the head rather than traveling up through the machine, preventing them from becoming trapped in a filter. It shouldn’t leave your floors soaking wet, either, and it comes with a sleek charging dock that lets it eke out 30 minutes per charge (you can also purchase a backup battery for $99.99). The 300ml clean water tank should be enough to cover over 1,000 square feet on the lowest hydration setting as well, after which it will need a refill.

zh.title: 戴森PencilWash超薄机型在阵亡将士纪念日迎来有史以来最低价格
zh.summary: 戴森PencilWash无绳地板清洁机在阵亡将士纪念日期间跌至全新低价$249.99（优惠$100），在多家零售商有售。这款纤薄设备配有紧凑的1.5英寸手柄，设计用于放在家具下方，采用加压补水系统和微纤维滚筒清洁硬地面，每次充电可提供30分钟的电池续航时间。其低维护设计防止碎屑和污水在机器内流动，确保清洁后地板保持相对干燥。

title: All of the updates from Elon Musk and Sam Altman’s battle over OpenAI
summary: Elon Musk's lawsuit against OpenAI and CEO Sam Altman ended with a unanimous jury verdict dismissing all charges based on the statute of limitations, after nearly a month of trial featuring testimony from Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella and other high-profile figures. Musk claimed OpenAI abandoned its founding mission to benefit humanity in favor of profit and sought the removal of Altman and Brockman. The advisory jury's decision was accepted by Judge Yvonne Gonzalez Rogers, effectively ending the high-stakes case.
content:
Sam Altman and Elon Musk are facing off in a high-stakes trial that could alter the future of OpenAI and its most well-known product, ChatGPT. In 2024, Musk filed a lawsuit accusing OpenAI of abandoning its founding mission of developing AI to benefit humanity and shifting focus to boosting profits instead. 
After nearly a month of the hearing that featured testimony from Musk, Altman, Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella, OpenAI cofounder Greg Brockman, former OpenAI board member and mother of several of Musk’s children Shivon Zilis, and a few others, the jury deliberated for a couple of hours before returning with a verdict, deciding to dismiss all charges due to the statute of limitations.
Musk was a cofounder of OpenAI and claims that Altman and Brockman tricked him into giving the company money, only to turn their backs on their original goal. However, OpenAI claimed that “This lawsuit has always been a baseless and jealous bid to derail a competitor” in a bid to boost Musk’s own SpaceX / xAI / X companies that have launched Grok as a competitor to ChatGPT.
In his lawsuit, Musk asked for the removal of Altman and Brockman, and for OpenAI to stop operating as a public benefit corporation.
People to Know
Plaintiff
Elon Musk — plaintiff, OpenAI cofounder and now CEO of rival xAI
Steven Molo — lead counsel for the plaintiff
Jared Birchall — manager of Musk’s family office
Shivon Zilis — former OpenAI board member who shares multiple children with Musk
Defendant
Sam Altman — defendant, CEO of OpenAI 
William Savitt — lead counsel for the defendant
Greg Brockman — president of OpenAI as well as a cofounder 
Ilya Sutskever — former chief scientist at OpenAI and a cofounder
Judge
Yvonne Gonzalez Rogers — aka YGR, trial judge
Here’s all the latest on the trial between Musk and Altman:
The jury has delivered a unanimous verdict.
			
An observer has just been ejected from the court by the US marshals.
			
C. Paul Wazzan is the expert called by Musk to determine damages.
			
Closin

zh.title: 埃隆·马斯克与山姆·奥特曼围绕OpenAI的争讼最新动态汇总
zh.summary: 埃隆·马斯克针对OpenAI及首席执行官山姆·奥特曼的诉讼以陪审团一致裁决驳回所有诉讼而告终，该裁决基于诉讼时效法。该案历时近一个月的庭审中，包括微软首席执行官萨蒂亚·纳德拉和其他知名人士的证词。马斯克声称OpenAI放弃了造福人类的创始使命而追逐利润，并寻求罢免奥特曼和布罗克曼。法官伊冯娜·冈萨雷斯·罗杰斯接受了陪审团的咨询性裁决，从而有效地结束了这场高风险案件。

title: Elon Musk loses his case against Sam Altman
summary: After two hours of deliberation, a jury unanimously dismissed Elon Musk's lawsuit against OpenAI, finding his claims were barred by the statute of limitations. The jury's advisory verdict was accepted by US District Judge Yvonne Gonzalez Rogers as the final legal decision. Musk's case centered on his claims of mistreatment by OpenAI cofounders.
content:
After around two hours of deliberation, the jury has reached a unanimous verdict in Musk v. Altman, the tech trial of the year. The group found that two claims were barred by the statute of limitations, and a third failed thanks to the dismissal of one of these.
The jury here is an advisory jury, meaning the group is installed solely to offer another opinion to the judge, and its verdict is technically not legally binding. Ultimately, US District Judge Yvonne Gonzalez Rogers is the ultimate legal authority - and she accepted the decision.
The jury found that Musk's claim for breach of charitable trust was barred by the statute of limitatio …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 埃隆·马斯克诉山姆·奥特曼案败诉
zh.summary: 经过两小时的合议，陪审团一致驳回了埃隆·马斯克对OpenAI的诉讼，认为他的诉讼请求因诉讼时效而不可受理。美国地方法官伊冯娜·冈萨雷斯·罗杰斯接受了陪审团的咨询性裁决作为最终法律判决。马斯克案件的焦点是他对OpenAI联合创始人不公正对待的指控。

title: Elon Musk has lost his lawsuit against Sam Altman and OpenAI
summary: Nine California jurors unanimously decided that Elon Musk's lawsuit against OpenAI and Sam Altman had been filed too late, applying statute of limitations defense to dismiss the case. Musk claimed mistreatment by his OpenAI cofounders and sought various remedies through the litigation. The verdict effectively concluded the high-profile tech trial.
content: Elon Musk's claim that he was mistreated by his OpenAI cofounders failed after nine California jurors decided in a unanimous verdict that his lawsuits had been filed too late.

zh.title: 埃隆·马斯克对山姆·奥特曼和OpenAI的诉讼败诉
zh.summary: 加州的九名陪审团成员一致认为埃隆·马斯克对OpenAI和山姆·奥特曼的诉讼提交时间过晚,适用诉讼时效条款驳回该案件。马斯克声称受到了OpenAI联合创始人的不公正对待,并通过诉讼寻求各种补救。该判决有效地结束了这场备受关注的科技诉讼。

title: NYC Health and Hospitals says hackers stole medical data and fingerprints during breach affecting at least 1.8 million people
summary: New York's public healthcare system disclosed one of 2026's largest data breaches, with hackers stealing personal and medical information plus biometric scans including fingerprints from at least 1.8 million people. The breach represents a significant security incident affecting a major healthcare provider serving millions. The theft of sensitive biometric data alongside personal health records creates serious privacy and identity theft risks for affected patients.
content: The New York public healthcare system said hackers stole personal and medical data, and scans of biometrics — including fingerprints — in one of the largest recorded breaches of 2026.

zh.title: 纽约卫生与医院公司称黑客在数据泄露事件中窃取了医疗数据和指纹,影响至少180万人
zh.summary: 纽约市公共医疗系统披露了2026年最大规模的数据泄露事件之一,黑客窃取了至少180万人的个人和医疗信息以及包括指纹在内的生物识别扫描数据。该泄露事件代表了影响服务数百万人的主要医疗提供者的重大安全事件。敏感生物识别数据与个人健康记录的盗窃对受影响患者造成严重的隐私和身份盗窃风险。

title: Google is rolling out its redesigned Workspace app icons
summary: Google is rolling out redesigned Workspace app icons featuring gradient effects that fade from lighter to darker shades, replacing the previous flat design approach. Some icons switched from rainbow designs to single colors including Google Chat, Meet, and Calendar, potentially improving visual distinction. The redesign aligns with Google's broader visual evolution from the logo update a year ago.
content:
It's not just you - the Google Workspace apps are getting a new look. The redesigned app icons, leaked last month, are now rolling out widely, as we started noticing this morning. Users with the redesigned icons will notice they now have a gradient look that fades from lighter to darker shades, rather than being the same flat tone throughout, similar to the redesigned Google logo that launched a year ago. 
Some of the icons switched from a rainbow design to a single color, like Google Chat, Meet, and Calendar, which could help all of the icons stand out a bit more from one another - or make them harder to recognize. Others haven't changed a …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 谷歌推出重新设计的Workspace应用图标
zh.summary: 谷歌推出了具有渐变效果的重新设计的Workspace应用图标,这些图标从较浅的颜色逐渐变为较深的颜色,取代了之前的平面设计方法。一些图标从彩虹设计改为单一颜色,包括Google Chat、Meet和Calendar,可能改进了视觉区分度。该重新设计与谷歌一年前徽标更新以来的更广泛的视觉演变相符。

title: Sony is raising short-subscription prices for PlayStation Plus
summary: Sony is increasing PlayStation Plus subscription prices in select regions starting May 20th, with US one-month subscriptions rising by $1 to $10.99 and three-month subscriptions increasing by $3 to $27.99. The company attributed the hike to "ongoing market conditions" but has not clarified whether premium subscription tiers will see similar increases. The price adjustment affects new subscribers and renewal pricing across multiple regions.
content:
Sony is hiking the starting price of one-month and three-month PlayStation Plus subscriptions in "select regions," blaming "ongoing market conditions." Beginning May 20th, 1-month subscriptions will start at $10.99 USD / €9.99 EUR / £7.99 GBP, while 3-month subscriptions will start at $27.99 USD / €27.99 EUR / £21.99 GBP.
In the US, the changes result in a $1 price increase for a one-month Essential tier subscription and a $3 increase for a three-month Essential tier subscription. It's unclear if other PlayStation Plus tiers will see price hikes as well. PlayStation didn't immediately reply to a request for comment.
If you are a current su …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 索尼提高PlayStation Plus短期订阅价格
zh.summary: 索尼从5月20日开始在特定地区提高PlayStation Plus订阅价格，美国一个月订阅费用上升1美元至10.99美元，三个月订阅费用上升3美元至27.99美元。该公司将价格上涨归因于"持续的市场条件"，但尚未澄清高级订阅层级是否会看到类似的涨价。价格调整影响多个地区的新订户和续订定价。

title: Five years later, Windows 11 brings back much-missed taskbar options (and more)
summary: Microsoft is testing smaller taskbar options and more customizable Start menu features for Windows 11, restoring functionality that users have long requested. These updates aim to give users greater control over their desktop environment and workflow customization. The features are currently in testing phases and may be rolled out in future Windows 11 updates.
content: Microsoft is also testing a smaller taskbar and more customizable Start menu.

zh.title: 五年后，Windows 11带回备受期待的任务栏选项（以及更多功能）
zh.summary: 微软正在测试Windows 11的较小任务栏选项和更可自定义的开始菜单功能，恢复用户长期以来要求的功能。这些更新旨在为用户提供对其桌面环境和工作流程自定义的更大控制权。这些功能目前处于测试阶段，可能在未来的Windows 11更新中推出。

title: Amazon Alexa Plus can now create AI-generated podcasts
summary: Amazon's Alexa Plus can now generate AI-hosted podcasts on virtually any topic, with users able to preview content and adjust episode length before generation begins. The feature allows users to provide a topic and receive an outline of what AI hosts will discuss, enabling real-time modifications. Examples range from history and music to sports events and educational content.
content:
Alexa Plus, Amazon's upgraded AI assistant, can now generate podcasts on "virtually any topic," according to an announcement on Monday. With the update, Amazon says you can give Alexa Plus a topic, and the AI assistant will offer an overview of what its AI hosts plan to talk about, allowing you to steer the conversation and adjust its length before it starts generating the episode.
Some "Alexa Podcast" examples shared by Amazon have two AI-generated hosts talking about the history of the Roman Empire, new music, and expectations for the World Cup. Amazon says you can also ask Alexa Plus to generate audio lessons about the Apollo missions, o …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 亚马逊Alexa Plus现在可以创建AI生成的播客
zh.summary: 亚马逊的Alexa Plus现在可以生成几乎任何主题的AI托管播客，用户能够在生成开始前预览内容并调整剧集长度。该功能允许用户提供主题并接收AI主持人将讨论内容的大纲，支持实时修改。示例范围从历史和音乐到体育赛事和教育内容。

title: Kin Health raises $9M to build an AI notetaker for patients
summary: Kin Health raised $9 million in funding for its AI-powered app that records doctor visits and automatically generates summaries with next steps that patients can share with family and friends. The platform functions similarly to meeting notetakers, automating medical consultation documentation to reduce patient burden. The funding enables the startup to expand its AI-driven patient engagement and healthcare coordination tools.
content: The app is similar to a meeting notetaker: you can record doctor visits, and it will return an AI summary of the meeting, with the next steps, all of which you share with family and friends if you want to.

zh.title: Kin Health筹集900万美元构建患者AI记录员
zh.summary: Kin Health为其AI驱动的应用程序筹集了900万美元资金，该应用可以记录医生访视并自动生成摘要，患者可与家人和朋友分享后续步骤。该平台的功能类似于会议记录员，自动化医疗咨询文档以减少患者负担。这笔资金使初创公司能够扩展其AI驱动的患者参与和医疗协调工具。

title: Philips Hue smart lights and a whole lot more are over 20 percent off
summary: Woot is running a day-long sale on Philips Hue smart lighting with an additional 20% discount via code SAVETWENTY, featuring entry-level products and advanced systems at significant markdowns. The sale includes the Philips Hue Bridge Gen 2 at $25.60 and the Play HDMI Sync Box 8K at $212, providing affordable entry points for smart home lighting. Discounted pricing makes it practical for both new users and those expanding existing smart home setups.
content:
A two-pack of wall washers usually costs over $300, but you can get them for $240. | Image: The Verge	

Woot is having a day-long sale on a range of tech, including a mix of new and open-box Philips Hue smart lighting. The retailer’s already-discounted prices are even cheaper today when you enter the code SAVETWENTY at checkout through midnight Central Time. The products included in the sale serve as a great introduction to setting up smart lights, or diving a little deeper.
For starters, there’s the Philips Hue Bridge Gen 2 that’s $25.60 with the code (versus $65.99 new at most), which is a required gadget for operating some Philips Hue products. For instance, you’ll need it to setup the Play HDMI Sync Box 8K ($212 with code, originally $384.99) that can sync other Hue lights to what’s showing on your TV screen. While some Hue devices fall back on Bluetooth, you’ll eventually need a Bridge if you plan to setup more than 10 lights or if you want to control lights remotely.
Philips Hue Solo Lightstrip (10-foot)

Where to Buy:

 $69.99 $40 at Woot (with code SAVETWENTY)

zh.title: 飞利浦Hue智能灯及更多产品超过20%折扣
zh.summary: Woot正在进行飞利浦Hue智能照明一日特卖，使用代码SAVETWENTY可额外享受20%折扣，入门级产品和高级系统均大幅降价。特卖包括飞利浦Hue Bridge Gen 2以25.60美元的价格和Play HDMI Sync Box 8K以212美元的价格，为智能家居照明提供了经济实惠的入门选项。折扣价格对新用户和扩展现有智能家居设置的用户都很实用。

title: The Verge’s 2026 college graduation gift guide
summary: The Verge has assembled a comprehensive 2026 college graduation gift guide featuring dozens of ideas for graduates facing major life transitions including job searches and moving into their first apartments. The curated selections balance celebratory gifts with practical items designed to ease the transition to independent adulthood. Recommendations span clothing care, household essentials, and tools for managing new professional responsibilities.
content:
Graduating from college is exciting, but it can also feel slightly terrifying. Along with celebrating a huge accomplishment, many grads jump right into looking for a job. Some might be getting their first apartment, too, which brings on a whole new set of responsibilities. That's why getting the right graduation gift is so important: They aren't merely celebratory, they can make these huge transitions feel a little less overwhelming.
We've curated dozens of gift ideas that celebrate their accomplishment and prepare them for life after college. Some of our picks are practical, meant to make adulting less daunting, including clothes steamers  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: The Verge的2026大学毕业礼物指南
zh.summary: The Verge精心编制了2026年大学毕业礼物指南，为面临重大人生转变（包括求职和搬入第一套公寓）的毕业生提供了数十个创意。精选礼物平衡了庆祝性礼物与实用物品，旨在缓解向独立成人生活的过渡。建议涵盖衣物护理、家居必需品和管理新职业责任的工具。

title: Amazon’s new Alexa+ powered feature can generate podcast episodes
summary: Amazon's Alexa+ now generates custom AI-hosted podcasts on demand, transforming the assistant from a question-answering tool into a personalized content creation platform. Users can request podcast episodes on virtually any topic with customizable length and content direction. The feature positions Alexa as a broader AI content ecosystem rather than a traditional voice assistant.
content: Amazon’s Alexa+ can now generate custom AI podcasts on demand, as the company expands its assistant into a personalized AI content platform.

zh.title: 亚马逊新款Alexa+功能可以生成播客剧集
zh.summary: 亚马逊的Alexa+现在可以按需生成定制的AI托管播客，将助手从问答工具转变为个性化内容创作平台。用户可以请求几乎任何主题的播客剧集，并可自定义长度和内容方向。该功能将Alexa定位为更广泛的AI内容生态系统，而不仅仅是传统的语音助手。

title: BMW sends off the 6th-gen M3 CS with a manual gearbox, rear-wheel drive
summary: BMW is ending the 6th-generation M3 CS production run with a special manual transmission variant featuring rear-wheel drive and a lighter overall design than the automatic version. The 2027 M3 CS Handschalter caters to driving enthusiasts who prefer three-pedal manual operation over traditional automatic transmissions. The manual option represents a return to classic performance car dynamics as the generation phases out.
content: The 2027 M3 CS Handschalter is lighter and comes with three pedals instead of two.

zh.title: 宝马用手动变速箱和后轮驱动送别第六代M3 CS
zh.summary: 宝马正在以特殊的手动变速箱变体结束第六代M3 CS的生产，该变体采用后轮驱动和比自动变速箱版本更轻的整体设计。2027年的M3 CS Handschalter迎合了偏好三踏板手动操作而不是传统自动变速箱的驾驶爱好者。手动选项代表了对经典性能车动力学的回归，因为这一代车型即将停产。

title: Linus Torvalds says Linux security list is becoming ‘unmanageable’ due to AI bug reports
summary: Linux founder Linus Torvalds criticized the flood of AI-generated bug reports overwhelming the Linux security mailing list, describing the situation as "unmanageable" due to massive duplication when multiple AI tools discover the same vulnerabilities. He warned developers that bugs found with AI tools are typically discovered by others simultaneously, urging more careful and thoughtful submissions. The influx has made it increasingly difficult to prioritize and manage legitimate security issues.
content:
Linux founder Linus Torvalds said in his most recent state of the kernel post that "the continued flood of AI reports has basically made the security list almost entirely unmanageable, with enormous duplication due to different people finding the same things with the same tools," as The Register reports. 
That probably doesn't apply to stuff like the "Copy Fail" exploit, which was detected with help from AI and affected nearly every Linux distro. 
"The documentation may be a bit less blunt than I am," Torvalds said. "So just to make it really clear: if you found a bug using AI tools, the chances are somebody else found it too." He called t …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 林纳斯·托瓦尔兹表示Linux安全列表因AI错误报告变得"难以管理"
zh.summary: Linux创始人林纳斯·托瓦尔兹批评了大量AI生成的错误报告涌入Linux安全邮件列表，当多个AI工具发现相同漏洞时出现大量重复，他将这种情况描述为"难以管理"。他警告开发人员，用AI工具发现的错误通常会被其他人同时发现，敦促进行更谨慎和深思熟虑的提交。这股涌入浪潮使得优先级划分和管理合法的安全问题变得越来越困难。

title: Leaked images reveal Sony’s 10th anniversary ‘ColleXion’ headphones
summary: Leaked renders reveal Sony's 10th anniversary "ColleXion" headphones featuring thicker leatherette padding and larger earcups compared to the current WH-1000XM6 series, with an expected launch tomorrow. The design shows significant changes to Sony's flagship over-ear headphone model.
content:
The headband certainly looks more pillowy than any of Sony’s current headphone models. | Images by HotEUDeals / OnLeaks	

We now have a good idea of what Sony's upcoming 10th anniversary headphones will look like before their expected launch tomorrow. Leaked image renders of what appears to be Sony's 1000X "The ColleXion" Edition have been shared online by OnLeaks and HotEUDeals, showing thicker leatherette padding and "generously sized" earcups compared to Sony's current WH-1000XM6 series.
We knew to expect these headphones after the "ColleXion" name briefly appeared on Sony's websites in April with an over-ear headphone model number of "WH-1000XX," but that wasn't accompanied by any images at the time. Now, not only can we see the full headphone design and i …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 泄露的图像揭示索尼第十周年"ColleXion"耳机
zh.summary: 泄露的渲染图显示索尼第十周年"ColleXion"耳机采用了更厚的人造皮革垫和比当前WH-1000XM6系列更大的耳罩，预计将在明天推出。该设计对索尼旗舰级头戴式耳机进行了重大改动。

title: Bad, Bad, Bad, Bad Roommate
summary: After her breakup in January 2025, Venice resident Frankee Grove struggled to afford her $5,100 monthly rent and turned to Facebook to find a roommate. She connected with Sabrina Mollison, a fitness influencer whose affluent, Instagram-focused lifestyle sharply contrasted with Grove's bohemian background and values.
content:
The wildfires that would come to engulf Los Angeles had just begun to burn when Frankee Grove finally admitted to herself that she needed a roommate. It was January 2025, and Grove, then 42, had recently broken up with her boyfriend of six years. They had lived together in a two-bedroom Spanish bungalow on a quaint street in Venice. For Grove, this rental — with its vegetable garden and hardwood floors, arched doorways, and terra-cotta roof — had come to feel like a home. 
But she couldn’t afford the $5,100 monthly rent by herself. She needed to find a subletter, but her spare time was spoken for: She was volunteering to help those impacted by the wildfires currently ravaging the Pacific Palisades. Grove, a dedicated empath and striving progressive who has two decades of experience in education, always tried to see the good in others, and she wanted to embody those qualities herself. 
Still, she was bleeding cash. Grove eventually turned to Facebook, hoping to find someone who could move in quickly. She connected with a woman named Sabrina Mollison, whose online persona was classic SoCal: A fledgling fitness influencer, she posted Instagram reels of herself working out in expensive athleisure, posed for selfies in full-length mirrors, and affixed aspirational (but fairly banal) captions under day-in-the-life content (“Trust the process” and “You can’t make progress if you don’t start”). 


Grove, who grew up in Massachusetts to teacher parents and had a decidedly more bohemian vibe — she launched a botanical side hustle, sported a surfer-girl haircut, and summered on Cape Cod — believed that their incompatibility might be a good thing. They didn’t need to be friends. Lately, her life was defined by instability. Grove welcomed a simple, transactional relationship. 
Mollison arrived for a tour wearing a workout uniform and a thick layer of makeup. Grove showed her the house. Mollison appeared underwhelmed, her affect flat, but said she would rent the room for Grove’s

zh.title: 坏，坏，坏，坏室友
zh.summary: 在2025年1月分手后，威尼斯居民弗兰基·格罗夫很难承担她5100美元的月租，转向Facebook寻找室友。她与健身网红萨布里娜·莫利森建立了联系，后者富有且专注于Instagram的生活方式与格罗夫的波希米亚背景和价值观形成了鲜明对比。

title: The US space enterprise is desperately waiting for Starship—will it finally deliver?
summary: The US space industry faces critical dependence on SpaceX's Starship program, which is expected to play a pivotal role in upcoming space missions. Success or failure of this venture will significantly impact the trajectory of American spaceflight capabilities.
content: "This is such a wild ride. The highs are high. The lows are low."

zh.title: 美国太空产业正在迫切等待星舰——它最终会交付吗?
zh.summary: 美国太空产业面临对SpaceX星舰项目的关键依赖，该项目预计将在即将到来的太空任务中发挥关键作用。这项事业的成功或失败将显著影响美国航天能力的发展轨迹。

title: South Korea’s LetinAR is building optics behind AI glasses
summary: South Korean startup LetinAR has developed thumbnail-sized optical lenses that could become the technological foundation for next-generation AI glasses. The company's innovation addresses a critical component needed to make augmented reality glasses practical and scalable.
content: A lens the size of a thumbnail — and the South Korean startup that makes it could become the optical backbone of the AI glasses era.

zh.title: 韩国LetinAR正在开发AI眼镜背后的光学技术
zh.summary: 韩国初创公司LetinAR开发了缩略图大小的光学镜片，可能成为下一代AI眼镜的技术基础。该公司的创新解决了使增强现实眼镜实用和可扩展所需的关键部件。

title: Disco Elysium’s spiritual successor can’t escape its phantoms
summary: "Zero Parades: For Dead Spies," a spiritual successor to the critically acclaimed 2019 RPG Disco Elysium, follows protagonist Cascade as she seeks redemption after a failed spy operation. The game explores themes of forgiveness and second chances after Cascade's five-year forced absence from active duty.
content:
Zero Parades: For Dead Spies wants you to question the price of forgiveness. After leading a crew of spies through a failed operation, protagonist Cascade is willing to pay whatever amount is needed to reestablish contact not just with fellow agents, but with the friends she let down. After being "frozen" for five years and forced to do desk work, Cascade is sent to the city of Portofiro with an assignment and a chance to redeem herself.
Zero Parades highly resembles Disco Elysium, the critically acclaimed 2019 RPG featuring a disastrous detective dealing with generational heartbreak and a hangover that split his psyche into dozens of voice …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 《迪斯科涅槃》的精神续作逃不出其幽灵
zh.summary: 《零游行：致死去的间谍》是备受好评的2019年RPG游戏《迪斯科涅槃》的精神续作，跟随主角凯斯凯德在失败的间谍行动后寻求救赎。该游戏探索了凯斯凯德强制离职五年后的原谅和第二次机会的主题。
